metadata.description: Community-maintained agent skills for dataset engineering, model training, evaluation, tracking, and automation across ModelScope workflows.

plugins.name: modelscope-model-trainer
plugins.description: Train and align language models with ms-swift and publish checkpoints to ModelScope Hub.

plugins.name: modelscope-paper-publisher
plugins.description: Draft and publish model-related research summaries to ModelScope repositories.

plugins.name: modelscope-datasets
plugins.description: Create, curate, and publish datasets on ModelScope Hub with template-driven validation and SQL-based analysis.

plugins.name: modelscope-evaluation
plugins.description: Manage benchmark results for ModelScope model repositories, including README extraction, score normalization, and metadata publishing.

plugins.name: modelscope-tool-builder
plugins.description: Build reusable automation scripts for ModelScope Hub API workflows.

plugins.name: modelscope-cli
plugins.description: Use the official modelscope CLI for ModelScope Hub authentication, repository creation, download, and upload workflows.

plugins.name: modelscope-mcp
plugins.description: Configure and use the official ModelScope MCP server for model search, dataset discovery, and repository metadata workflows.

plugins.name: modelscope-jobs
plugins.description: Execute reproducible ML workflows and publish outputs to ModelScope repositories using UV scripts and token-authenticated uploads.

plugins.name: modelscope-tracking
plugins.description: Track experiments with local run manifests, metric logs, artifact catalogs, and summary exports for ModelScope workflows.

plugins.name: modelscope-dataset-explorer
plugins.description: Explore ModelScope datasets using Hub metadata APIs, local snapshot downloads, and SQL analysis with DuckDB.

plugins.name: gradio
plugins.description: Build Gradio web UIs and demos in Python. Use when creating or editing Gradio apps, components, event listeners, layouts, or chatbots.

plugins.name: transformers-js
plugins.description: Build JavaScript and TypeScript inference workflows with Transformers.js, using ModelScope-hosted assets through local downloads.

plugins.name: modelscope-vision-trainer
plugins.description: Train and fine-tune vision models with reproducible data pipelines and publish checkpoints to ModelScope Hub.
